statement: Thunder Compute lists H100 80GB rentals at $2.19/hr, within a broad market range of $2.01-$11.06/hr across providers.
why: Reference rental price level for H100 GPUs.

impact.mechanism: H100 hourly rental level anchors merchant-GPU and neocloud rental economics.

evidence.source: Thunder Compute — AI GPU Rental Market Trends (July 2026)
Thunder Compute — AI GPU Rental Market Trends (July 2026)
evidence.excerpt: H100 80GB pricing now runs from $2.01/hr to $11.06/hr

confidence.basis: single vendor rate card, secondary source

dispersion: conflicting same-key reports: value 1.09 -> 2.19 (tol 1%); sources: Thunder Compute — AI GPU Rental Market Trends (July 2026)
